summary: Iteration 31 - Section Template System testing COMPLETE. All features verified: Admin Page Headers tab shows 'PROGRAM PAGE SECTIONS — STRUCTURE' section with 4 default sections (journey, who_for, experience, why_now). Admin Programs tab split into Part 1 (Homepage Card) and Part 2 (Page Content) with template-driven section editor showing only text fields. Image upload only for 'experience' (dark BG) sections. Know More button visible on all flagship programs (IDs 1, 2, 5). ProgramDetailPage uses global section template for structure.
critical_code_review_comments: PageHeadersTab.jsx: PROGRAM PAGE SECTIONS — STRUCTURE section with add/remove/reorder controls works correctly
PageHeadersTab.jsx: 4 default sections (journey, who_for, experience, why_now) displayed with correct order
PageHeadersTab.jsx: Experience section has dark background styling (#3 shows yellow text on dark bg)
AdminPanel.jsx: Part 1 label 'PART 1 — HOMEPAGE CARD & GENERAL SETTINGS' shown in gold/yellow
AdminPanel.jsx: Part 2 label 'PART 2 — PROGRAM PAGE CONTENT' shown in blue with note about global font styles
AdminPanel.jsx: Section editor shows only Title/Subtitle/Body fields (no per-section font controls)
AdminPanel.jsx: Image upload field shown ONLY for experience (dark BG) section - verified with has_image_field test
ProgramsSection.jsx: Know More button (data-testid='know-more-btn-{id}') shown on all flagship programs
ProgramDetailPage.jsx: Uses sectionTemplate for structure (lines 83-112) with correct fallback to defaults
site_settings.py: DEFAULT_SECTION_TEMPLATE with 4 sections auto-seeded if empty
seed_data_creation: None - used existing programs and default section template
context_for_next_testing_agent: Section template system fully implemented. Template stored at settings.program_section_template with 4 default sections. Admin Programs tab split into Part 1 (Homepage Card settings) and Part 2 (Page Content). Page Content section shows template-driven editor with only text fields - image upload only for 'experience' type sections. Know More button shown on all flagship programs (IDs 1, 2, 5) and programs with enrollment_closed.
